title: Tango Fluffy Scramble
description: A simple and flavorful breakfast dish made with fluffy eggs, tango sauce, and caramelized onions.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until caramelized.
Pour in the eggs and cook until the edges start to set.
Add the tango sauce and stir to combine.
Use a spatula to gently scramble the eggs.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the eggs are cooked through.
